allowed_claim_sentence: ClaimBound public materials completed a narrow public-interest funding-eligibility self-check.
baseline_control_summary: Manual source-boundary check: public-interest funding eligibility categories + public ClaimBound materials + sanitized mapping summary + forbidden-claim review.
claim_boundary: This card verifies only that ClaimBound public materials can be mapped to selected public-interest open-source funding eligibility activity categories under a frozen manual checklist on the access date. It does not prove approval, endorsement, funding likelihood, legal eligibility, reviewer acceptance, or superiority over manual review.
known_limitations: This is a funding-fit self-check, not a funding decision.
Private submitted application text is not committed or fully audited in this public card.
The result does not prove approval, endorsement, legal eligibility or award likelihood.
The mapping may drift if the external eligibility page changes after the access date.
This is a single-operator manual check and is not independently reproduced.
manual_review: The operator manually checked an external public-interest open-source funding eligibility page, mapped selected eligible categories to public ClaimBound materials, reviewed forbidden inferences, kept private application text out of the repository, and accepted only the narrow funding-fit source-audit claim.
official_source_url: source identity withheld from public card to avoid implying funder affiliation
raw_payload_manifest: official source fetched locally only; local source SHA-256 3e17b458f10d7f25825422b00b3c0625bb75ade865c2b4200b59f05440dd8b5e; byte size 17745; no raw external page or private application text committed
runner_command: Manual checklist using docs/track_families/FUNDING_FIT_D001_FAMILY_LEDGER.json, artifacts/funding_fit_d001_summary.json, local source snapshot in an ignored .claimbound_runs run root, and uv run --extra dev claimbound validate-all
source_rights_note: External public eligibility page used for source-boundary evidence only; this card records access date, local hash, sanitized mapping and limitations. Private application text is not committed. The source identity is omitted from the public card to avoid implying funder affiliation.

visual_summary.allowed_claim_sentence: ClaimBound public materials completed a narrow public-interest funding-eligibility self-check.
visual_summary.candidate_definition: ClaimBound public evidence-card workflow and registry discipline.
visual_summary.controls_and_gate: external public eligibility source + public ClaimBound materials + forbidden-claim review.
